data.title: feat: plan/ — project planning structure
data.description:
Project planning scaffold: brief, roadmap, state, codebase map, and phases.

## Structure

```
.skogai/plan/
├── PROJECT.md        # brief: what, why, constraints, key decisions
├── ROADMAP.md        # phase breakdown with status
├── STATE.md          # current session state (what's accumulated)
├── codebase/         # architecture, stack, conventions, structure map
│   ├── ARCHITECTURE.md
│   ├── CONVENTIONS.md
│   ├── STACK.md
│   └── STRUCTURE.md
└── phases/           # per-phase directories
```
